pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency from version 3.5.6 to 4.0.2.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to explicitly release for Java 21 and remove Lombok-specific annotation processor exclusions.
Add the Spring Boot Security starter to enable security features.
Add the Spring Boot JDBC starter for direct database access capabilities.
Add Spring Boot DevTools to enable automatic restarts and live reload during development.
Add the JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add the JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add the JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization support in JWTs.
Add the Jakarta Validation API for bean validation support.
Add Apache HttpClient 5 for HTTP client functionality.
Add Apache HttpClient 5 Fluent API for easier HTTP request construction.
Remove the explicit version from the Lombok dependency to let Spring Boot manage it.
Change the project packaging type from jar to war.
Update the Maven group ID from com.java to org.example.
Update the project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 1.0-SNAPSHOT.
Remove the explicit spring-security-crypto dependency as it is now included in spring-boot-starter-security.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Added configuration to activate a specific Spring profile (dev).
Changed the Hibernate dialect from MySQL8 to the generic MySQL dialect.
Enabled SQL statement logging by setting the Hibernate SQL log level to DEBUG.
Added configuration property for the JWT secret key with a default fallback value.
Removed hardcoded database connection details (URL, username, password) from the properties file.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.human_impl: Removed spring.datasource.url, username, and password lines

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Removed explicit JDBC driver class name configuration, relying on Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Removed configuration for logging to a specific file path.
Removed custom console logging pattern configuration.
Removed explicit HikariCP connection timeout configuration.
Removed explicit Hibernate physical naming strategy configuration.
